text:
Once upon a time, in a cozy little town called Willowbrook, there lived a wise old owl called Owlsworth. He didn't do much except read old books and soar about at night. But someday-he decided.

Owlsworth knew about a secret cavern deep in Blackwood Forest. Legend said it held diamonds sharper than daggers. So one moonlit night, he fly'd there. Into bats! He found heaps of sparkle. Twinkle dewdrops. But one stone felt different. Diamond scales!

Back home he hid it. Soon teens heard tales. They came to find. Owlsworth fled. They searched. No diamond but whispers.

Then friends helped. Together they save wolves' bark. Now stars twinkle bright.

And Owlsworth learned you've got friends. But beware of diamonds.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
